variations: I don't need to climb the sky to break off the moon — I only need you, willing, to turn my way and smile once more.

items.sourceNote: 尚公主（2026 孟子義）古裝喜劇愛情「公主先愛江山也愛自己」獨立母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我是公主，要嫁誰、何時嫁，從來輪不到別人替我點頭——我這一生先要過得痛快，至於有沒有人陪，那是錦上添花，不是雪中送炭。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝大女主/獨立公主、先愛自己再談感情主題，配公主獨行或笑看朝堂劇照，或寫給「先把日子過好、緣分隨緣」的自己。
variations: 別替我著急那門親事——我這把人生的算盤，從來只有我自己撥得響。

en.content: I'm a princess — who I marry and when has never been anyone else's nod to give. I'll live this life on my own terms first; whether someone walks it with me is icing, not the cake.
en.editorNote: For an independent-princess heroine, self-first-then-romance theme — pairs with a princess-walking-alone or smiling-over-the-court still; for the "live well first, let love come as it comes" you.
variations: Don't fret over that marriage match for me — the abacus of my life only ever rattles when I'm the one working it.

items.sourceNote: 尚公主（2026 孟子義×李昀銳）「瘋批公主×寒門宰相」政治聯姻由互相利用到並肩守家國母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這樁婚事一開始，我算的是你能替我擋多少刀，你算的是我能替你開多少路——可算著算著，我忽然不想再算了，只想護著你，把這盤棋走到最後。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝政治聯姻、由互相利用到動真情主題，配朝堂並肩或聯姻對視劇照，或寫給「本來是合作、後來是真心」的那個人。
variations: 我們是被綁在一條船上的兩個人，可划到後來我才發現，就算能上岸，我也不想放你一個人漂。

en.content: At the start of this marriage I was counting how many blades you'd take for me, and you were counting how many doors I'd open for you — but somewhere along the way I stopped counting, and only wanted to protect you and play this game out to the very end.
en.editorNote: For a political-marriage arc that turns from mutual use into real feeling — pairs with a side-by-side-at-court or wedding-gaze still; for the "started as a deal, became real" person.
variations: We were two people tied to the same boat — but by the time we'd rowed this far, I realized that even if I could reach the shore, I wouldn't want to leave you adrift alone.

items.sourceNote: 尚公主（2026）「瘋批公主」瘋批大女主鋒利自我宣言 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們說我瘋，我倒覺得是他們太乖——這世道規規矩矩的人都被欺負死了，我偏要瘋給你們看，看誰先撐不住。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝瘋批大女主、鋒利反擊主題，配挑眉冷笑或掀桌名場面劇照，或寫給「不想再當乖乖牌、決定亮爪子」的自己。
variations: 乖女孩的下場我看多了，所以我選擇當那個讓對手睡不著覺的人。

en.content: They call me mad; I'd say they're just too well-behaved — the polite ones in this world all got trampled to death, so I'll be as mad as they want and see who cracks first.
en.editorNote: For a fierce, unhinged-heroine comeback — pairs with a raised-brow smirk or table-flipping scene; for the "done being the good girl, showing my claws" you.
variations: I've seen enough of what happens to good girls — so I chose to be the one who keeps my rivals up at night.

items.sourceNote: 冰湖重生（2026 楚喬傳續集，李昀銳×黃楊鈿甜）亂世重逢「以為死別卻再相見」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 那年湖面結冰，我親眼看你沉下去，從此把半條命也一起埋進了冰底；沒想到多年後，你竟從那片湖裡走回來——原來老天爺欠我的那口氣，一直替我留著。
zh-tw.editorNote: 亂世生離死別後重逢主題，配冰湖或雪地劇照，或寫給「以為再也見不到、卻又重新遇見」的人。
variations: 我已經學會不再等你了，可你偏偏在我最不敢期待的時候，走回我面前——這一次，我說什麼都不放手了。

en.content: The year the lake froze over, I watched you sink beneath it with my own eyes, and buried half my life down there in the ice with you; who could have known that years later you'd walk back out of that lake — turns out the breath heaven owed me had been kept for me all along.
en.editorNote: For a wartime reunion after a presumed death — pairs with a frozen-lake or snowfield still; for the "thought I'd never see you again, and here you are" person.
variations: I'd already taught myself to stop waiting for you — and then, at the exact moment I no longer dared to hope, you walked back to me; this time I'm not letting go for anything.

items.sourceNote: 御賜小仵作2（2026）古裝探案女仵作「替死者說話、為真相翻案」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 死人不會喊冤，可他們身上每一道傷，都是沒說完的話；我這雙手翻的不是屍骨，是替再也開不了口的人，把最後一句真相討回來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝探案/女仵作職人主題，配驗屍卷宗或燭下查案劇照，或形容「幫沒有聲音的人把公道要回來」。
variations: 別人怕碰屍體，我卻覺得——比起活人一張張會說謊的嘴，這些不會騙人的骨頭，反倒可靠多了。

en.content: The dead can't cry injustice, but every wound on them is a sentence left unfinished; what these hands turn over isn't bones — it's the last line of truth, reclaimed for the ones who can never speak again.
en.editorNote: For a period-mystery, forensic-examiner professional theme — pairs with an autopsy-file or candlelit-investigation still; for "getting justice back for those who have no voice."
variations: Others flinch from touching a corpse; I'd say that next to the living and their lying mouths, these bones that never deceive are far more trustworthy.

items.sourceNote: 千香（2026 宋威龍×鞠婧禕）古裝奇幻愛情「以香為引、循香尋人」浪漫母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這世上的香我聞過千百種，唯獨你身上那一縷，我閉著眼、隔著整座城，也能一路循著找回來——原來我修煉這麼多年，是為了在人海裡，一眼就認出你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝奇幻唯美愛情、循香尋人主題，配花香繚繞或人海回眸劇照，或寫給「在千萬人裡，我一下就認出是你」的人。
variations: 別人靠眼睛認人，我靠的是心——你走過的地方，連空氣都會替我留一句「她在這裡」。

en.content: I've breathed in a thousand kinds of scent in this world, but that single trace of yours — I could follow it home with my eyes shut, from the far side of a whole city; turns out all my years of cultivation were just so I could pick you out at a glance in a sea of people.
en.editorNote: For an ethereal fantasy romance, following-a-scent-to-find-someone theme — pairs with a blossom-scented or turning-back-in-a-crowd still; for the "among ten thousand people, I knew you instantly" person.
variations: Others recognize people by their eyes; I do it with my heart — everywhere you've passed, even the air keeps a whisper for me: she was here.

items.sourceNote: 折腰（2026 劉宇寧×宋祖兒）世仇聯姻先婚後愛「代嫁入敵門」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我是被送進你家門的一顆棋子，本該恨你一輩子；偏偏這局棋下到後來，我才發現——最先亂了方寸的，是我自己這顆心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 世仇聯姻、先婚後愛主題，配紅蓋頭或敵對雙方對視劇照，或寫給「本來該恨你、最後卻愛上你」的人。
variations: 兩家的血債我一筆都沒忘，可你替我擋那一劍的時候，我忽然不知道，這帳到底該怎麼算了。

en.content: I was sent into your household as a pawn, meant to hate you for a lifetime — but by the time the game had played out, I realized the first one to lose her composure on the board was my own heart.
en.editorNote: For a feuding-families arranged-marriage, love-after-marriage theme — pairs with a red-veil or enemies-facing-off still; for the "was supposed to hate you, ended up loving you" person.
variations: I haven't forgotten a single debt of blood between our houses — but the moment you took that blade meant for me, I no longer knew how the accounts were supposed to balance.

items.sourceNote: 月鱗綺紀（2026 畫皮IP改編）人妖神三界虐戀「明知是妖偏動了情」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們說你披的是張畫皮，底下藏著獠牙；可我看了千百遍，那皮下面藏著的，分明是一顆比誰都怕受傷的心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 人妖/畫皮題材虐戀、世人懼怕唯我心疼主題，配面具或半人半妖劇照，或寫給「別人看你是怪物、我看你是委屈」的人。
variations: 你是人是妖我早就不在意了，我只知道——這三界裡，肯把後背交給我的，就只有你一個。

en.content: They say what you wear is a painted skin with fangs hidden underneath; but I've looked a thousand times, and what's hidden under that skin is plainly a heart more afraid of being hurt than anyone's.
en.editorNote: For a human-and-spirit painted-skin tragic romance — the world fears you, I only ache for you; pairs with a mask or half-human-half-spirit still.
variations: Whether you're human or spirit stopped mattering to me long ago — I only know that in all three realms, you're the only one who'll turn your back to me and trust it stays safe.

items.sourceNote: 2026 宅鬥大女主「不爭是命、要爭是本事」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 從前我信「與世無爭」是美德，後來才懂——你不爭，這院子裡的人不會放過你，只會把你的份，一口一口分給別人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宅鬥大女主覺醒、學會爭取主題，配深宅大院或轉身反擊劇照，或寫給「善良別忘了帶點鋒芒」的自己。
variations: 我不是變壞了，我只是終於明白——一味退讓，換不來體諒，只換來別人踩你的膽子。

en.content: I used to believe "wanting nothing" was a virtue; later I understood — if you don't fight for your share, the people in this house won't spare you, they'll just divide what's yours among themselves, mouthful by mouthful.
en.editorNote: For a mansion-intrigue heroine's awakening — learning to fight for her place; pairs with a grand-courtyard or turning-to-strike-back still; kindness with an edge.
variations: I haven't turned cruel — I've just finally learned that endless yielding never buys you understanding, it only buys other people the nerve to step on you.

items.sourceNote: 古裝穿越追劇族自嘲 meta register 參考，內容為原創

zh-tw.content: 看穿越劇時我最有自信——女主一穿越就會醫術、會經商、還能收服霸總；而我穿越過去，大概第一集就因為不會用馬桶，領了便當。
zh-tw.editorNote: 穿越劇追劇族自嘲、配「幻想自己是女主但其實是路人甲」貼文，輕鬆收尾用。
variations: 古裝女主穿越是逆天改命，我要是穿越，光是聽懂古人講話，就得先當三集啞巴。

en.content: I'm never more confident than when I'm watching a time-travel drama — the heroine lands in the past already knowing medicine, trade, and how to tame the cold CEO type; if I traveled back, I'd probably get written off in episode one for not knowing how to use the toilet.
en.editorNote: Self-deprecating time-travel binge humor — for the "imagine I'm the heroine, but I'm actually an extra" post.
variations: A period heroine time-traveling rewrites her whole destiny; if I traveled back, just understanding how ancient people talk would keep me mute for the first three episodes.

items.sourceNote: 2026 古裝甜寵「一起吃苦不算苦」患難日常母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我們現在住的破廟連瓦都漏，可只要你在，這風雨我都嫌它下得不夠大——反正淋不濕的地方，就在你替我撐傘的那一小塊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝甜寵患難與共、苦日子也甜主題，配破廟避雨或兩人共傘劇照，或寫給「跟你在一起、吃苦也像過節」的人。
variations: 別人問我苦不苦，我都笑——鍋裡只有一碗粥的時候，你先推到我面前，那一刻我半點都不覺得窮。

en.content: The broken shrine we're living in now leaks even through the roof tiles, but as long as you're here I almost wish the storm came down harder — the one spot it can't soak me is the little patch where you're holding the umbrella over my head.
en.editorNote: For a cozy period-romance through-hardship-together theme — even hard days taste sweet; pairs with a sheltering-from-rain or shared-umbrella still.
variations: When people ask if it's been hard, I just smile — the moment there was only one bowl of porridge in the pot and you pushed it to me first, I didn't feel poor at all.

items.sourceNote: 2026 武俠+朝堂權謀劇（雨霖鈴 register）「刺客也有不忍下手的一刀」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這雙手取過那麼多人的性命，從不手軟；偏偏走到你面前，那一刀怎麼也遞不出去——原來殺手最怕的，不是刀口，是心軟。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠刺客/暗殺者破功主題，配月夜出鞘或收刀的劇照，或形容「對誰都狠，唯獨對你下不了手」。
variations: 我殺人不用理由，可要放下這一刀，我卻找了一整夜的理由——最後只想到你。

en.content: These hands have taken more lives than I can count, never once wavering — and yet the moment I stand before you, I can't push that blade forward. Turns out what an assassin fears most isn't the edge of a knife, it's going soft.
en.editorNote: For the assassin-goes-soft trope — pairs with an unsheathing or lowered-blade still; "ruthless to everyone, unable to hurt only you."
variations: I need no reason to kill, but to lay this one blade down I hunted for reasons all night — and in the end the only one I found was you.

items.sourceNote: 2026 畫皮改編奇幻劇（月鱗綺紀 register）「人妖神三界之戀」跨界深情母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們說人妖殊途，隔著的是一整條生死界線；可我這身皮囊底下，藏的偏偏是一顆比誰都想守著你的心——你要嫌我不是人，那我情願，只做你一個人的妖。
zh-tw.editorNote: 人妖/跨界戀主題，配畫皮或半人半妖劇照，或寫給「世人容不下，我偏要愛」的那種深情。
variations: 我不求做人，也不稀罕成神，這三界我只想討一個位置——站在你伸手就能碰到的地方。

en.content: They say human and spirit walk different roads, split by the whole line between life and death — but under this borrowed skin of mine hides a heart that wants to guard you more than anyone's. If you can't stand that I'm not human, then I'd gladly be just one person's demon: yours.
en.editorNote: For a human-spirit, cross-realm romance — pairs with a painted-skin or half-human still; the love the world won't allow but you choose anyway.
variations: I don't ask to be human or care to become a god — in all three realms I only want one spot: close enough that you could reach out and touch me.

items.sourceNote: 2026 制茶世家商戰古裝（女主嗅覺天賦逆襲）「憑本事翻身」大女主母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們笑我一個沒落茶行的丫頭懂什麼生意，我沒回嘴——等這一批茶送進宮裡，讓所有人都爭著搶，那時候我的名字，就是最響的回答。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝商戰大女主、憑實力翻身主題，配茶行/市集劇照，或寫給「別人看扁我，我用結果打臉」的自己。
variations: 嘴上的較量我沒興趣，我只把力氣留給一件事——把那些看不起我的人，一個一個變成來求我合作的人。

en.content: They laugh that a girl from a fallen-down tea house knows nothing about trade; I don't argue back — wait until this batch reaches the palace and everyone's fighting to buy it, and by then my name will be the loudest answer there is.
en.editorNote: For a period business-battle heroine rising on merit — pairs with a tea-house or marketplace still; for the "you underestimated me, I'll let results speak" you.
variations: I've no interest in a war of words — I save my strength for one thing: turning every person who looked down on me into someone coming to beg me for a deal.

items.sourceNote: 2026 暗河傳（刺客組織權力鬥爭 register）「查一個真相把整個組織翻過來」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你們把我養大，教我聽命行事，卻忘了教我一件事——一個人一旦開始問「為什麼」，這整條暗河，就再也蓋不住底下的血了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠/刺客組織反叛、追查真相主題，配暗夜組織或翻案劇照，或形容「開始懷疑之後，就再也回不去了」。
variations: 我沉在這條河底太久，久到都快忘了自己是誰——直到我決定，這一次要浮上來，親手掀開水面。

en.content: You raised me, you trained me to follow orders — but you forgot to teach me one thing: the moment a person starts asking "why," this whole dark river can no longer keep the blood underneath it hidden.
en.editorNote: For an assassin-order rebellion / truth-hunting arc — pairs with a shadowy-organization or case-reopened still; "once you start doubting, there's no going back."
variations: I sank to the bottom of this river so long I nearly forgot who I was — until I decided that this time, I'd rise up and tear open the surface myself.

items.sourceNote: 逐玉（2026）亂世並肩「你護天下我護你」雙強互相成全母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你去扛你的天下，我來守我們的家；等哪天你累了、倦了、被全世界辜負了，你只要回頭——這盞燈、這頓飯、還有我，都還在原地等你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 亂世雙強、互相成全主題，配並肩或歸家劇照，或寫給「你去闖，我幫你守住退路」的那個人。
variations: 我不攔你走，因為我知道你心裡有更大的事要做；我只保證一件事——你回來的路，我替你點著燈。

en.content: You go carry your empire; I'll guard our home. And on the day you're worn out, weary, let down by the whole world, all you have to do is turn back — this lamp, this meal, and me, we're all still right here waiting for you.
en.editorNote: For a wartime two-strong-leads, mutual-support theme — pairs with a side-by-side or homecoming still; for the "you go fight, I'll hold your way back" person.
variations: I won't stop you from leaving, because I know there's something bigger in your heart to do — I only promise one thing: the road home, I'll keep the lamp lit for you.

items.sourceNote: 逍遙（2026）人妖殊途「你是妖我也認」跨族深情母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們說人妖殊途，勸我趁早收手；可我攤開手心才發現，早在遇見你那天，我這條路就只剩一個方向——朝你走。
zh-tw.editorNote: 人妖戀/跨族禁忌深情主題，配萬妖谷或人妖對望劇照，或寫給「世界不看好、我偏要選你」的那個人。
variations: 殊途就殊途，大不了我陪你走一條沒人走過的——反正有你在的那頭，才叫路。

en.content: They say human and demon walk separate roads, and told me to quit while I could — but when I opened my hand, I realized that since the day I met you, my road only ever pointed one way: toward you.
en.editorNote: For a human-demon, forbidden cross-kind romance — pairs with a demon-valley or across-the-divide still; for the "the world says no, I still choose you" person.
variations: Separate roads, then — worst case I'll walk one no one's walked before, since the only side that counts as a road is the side you're standing on.

items.sourceNote: 月鱗綺紀（2026）畫皮/狐妖宿命「認得你的不是皮相是魂」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 人都愛看一張好皮相，我卻只認你這一縷魂——你就算換了張臉、丟了名字，我在人海裡，還是能一眼把你認回來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 畫皮/狐妖宿命輪迴主題，配鏡花水月或換皮劇照，或寫給「認得的從來不是外表，是那個人」。
variations: 皮相會老、會換、會被人搶了去，可魂只有一個——而那一個，我這幾世都只認得你。

en.content: People all fall for a pretty face; I only ever knew you by your soul — even if you swapped your face and lost your name, I could still pick you out of a crowd at a single glance.
en.editorNote: For a painted-skin / fox-spirit fated-reincarnation theme — pairs with a mirror-flowers or changing-skin still; "what I recognized was never the face, it was the person."
variations: A face ages, changes, gets stolen away — but a soul comes only one to a person, and that one, across all these lifetimes, I've only ever known as you.

items.sourceNote: 2026 古裝甜寵「先當對手再當同盟」歡喜冤家並肩母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我們吵了三年，從朝堂吵到後院，連下棋都要爭個輸贏；直到那天你替我擋了一劍，我才發現——原來我最想贏的那個人，也是我最不想輸掉的那個人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 歡喜冤家/勢均力敵先爭後愛主題，配鬥嘴或並肩迎敵劇照，或寫給「吵歸吵，關鍵時候還是站你這邊」的那個人。
variations: 我以為我們是天生的對手，後來才懂——會為你緊張、怕你受傷的，早就不是對手該有的反應了。

en.content: We bickered for three years, from the court hall to the back courtyard, fighting to win even at a game of chess — until the day you took a blade meant for me, and I realized the person I most wanted to beat was also the one I could least stand to lose.
en.editorNote: For an evenly-matched enemies-to-lovers, rivals-then-allies theme — pairs with a squabbling or back-to-back-against-danger still; for the "we argue, but I've got your side when it counts" person.
variations: I thought we were born rivals — then I understood that getting anxious over you, dreading you getting hurt, stopped being a rival's reaction a long time ago.

items.sourceNote: 白日提燈（2026）四百年女鬼王×年輕將軍「跨越生死時差」跨界戀母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我等了四百年，才等到一個敢牽我手的人——你別怕我涼，我這雙手冷了那麼久，就是為了留給你來焐。
zh-tw.editorNote: 人鬼戀/跨越生死時差的跨界深情主題，配夜燈或人鬼對望劇照，或寫給「等了很久才等到懂我的人」的那個人。
variations: 你活在白天，我困在黑夜，可只要你肯提著這盞燈來找我，我就把整個四百年，都當成是在等你。

en.content: I waited four hundred years for someone brave enough to take my hand — don't be scared that I'm cold. These hands stayed frozen this long just so I'd have them left for you to warm.
en.editorNote: For a ghost-and-mortal, across-a-lifetime cross-realm romance — pairs with a lantern-at-night or living-meets-spirit still; for the one you waited a long time to finally be understood by.
variations: You live in the daylight, I'm trapped in the dark — but if you'll just carry that lantern and come find me, I'll count all four hundred years as time spent waiting for you.

items.sourceNote: 夢花廷（2026）失明公主異能「看不見卻看得最清」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們笑我眼睛看不見，卻不知道——正因為看不見那些浮華的臉，我才聽得出，誰的每一句好話底下，藏著一把刀。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宮廷失明大女主、以弱勝強主題，配公主獨坐或宮宴劇照，或寫給「別人小看你，其實你比誰都清醒」的那個人。
variations: 你們都盯著我這雙看不見的眼，卻沒人發現，我早把你們每一個轉身的腳步聲，都記在了心裡。

en.content: They laugh that my eyes can't see — what they don't know is that precisely because I can't see all those glossy faces, I can hear the knife hidden under everyone's kind words.
en.editorNote: For a blind palace-heroine, weak-beats-strong theme — pairs with a princess-alone or banquet still; for the one who's underestimated but sees clearer than anyone.
variations: You all fix your eyes on these eyes of mine that can't see, and not one of you noticed that I've long since memorized the sound of every footstep you turn away on.

items.sourceNote: 冰湖重生（楚喬傳續作，2026）亂世重生「一身傷疤換來的清醒」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 從冰湖裡活著爬上來的那一刻我就想通了——這條命是自己撿回來的，往後就沒有誰，值得我再拿它去換一場空歡喜。
zh-tw.editorNote: 亂世重生大女主、劫後清醒主題，配冰湖或劫後重生劇照，或寫給「吃過一次虧就徹底醒了」的自己。
variations: 你們以為那湖水凍死了我，其實它凍醒了我——把我心裡那點多餘的軟，一併凍成了刀。

en.content: The moment I clawed my way out of that frozen lake alive, it all became clear — this life I dragged back myself, and from now on no one is worth trading it for a hope that comes to nothing.
en.editorNote: For a wartime-rebirth heroine, clear-eyed-after-disaster theme — pairs with a frozen-lake or risen-from-the-ashes still; for the "burned once, wide awake now" you.
variations: You thought that lake water froze me to death — it froze me awake, and turned the last bit of needless softness in my heart into a blade along the way.

items.sourceNote: 折月亮（2026）「暗戀多年終於說出口」隱忍暗戀成全母題 register 移植古裝，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這些年我把喜歡你的話，一句一句都嚥了回去，攢成了滿滿一肚子的月光——今天說給你聽，不圖你回應，只圖我這輩子，總算跟你坦白過一次。
zh-tw.editorNote: 多年暗戀終於開口、不求回應只求坦白主題，配月夜獨白或欲言又止劇照，或寫給「藏了很久、只想讓對方知道一次」的心情。
variations: 我不奢望你回頭，只想在你走之前，把這句藏了整整一輪四季的話，親口交還給你。

en.content: All these years I swallowed the words "I love you" back one by one, until they'd saved up into a whole belly full of moonlight — I'm telling you today not for an answer, just so that once in this life, I finally came clean to you.
en.editorNote: For a years-long quiet crush finally spoken — not for a response, just to be honest; pairs with a moonlit-monologue or holding-back still; for the feeling you hid a long time and only wanted them to know once.
variations: I don't dare hope you'll turn around — I only want, before you go, to hand you back with my own voice these words I've kept hidden through a full turn of the seasons.

items.sourceNote: 莫離（2026）「政治聯姻，兩個帶著傷的人互相試探」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這樁婚事是別人算計好的一步棋，可我沒料到——兩個各自藏著刀的人，坐久了同一張桌子，竟慢慢學會了把刀，先放在對方看得見的地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 政治聯姻、雙向試探到互信主題，配紅蓋頭或對坐燭光劇照，或寫給「防備了一輩子，卻在你面前先卸了甲」的關係。
variations: 我們都是被推上棋盤的棋子，唯一沒算進去的，是我開始不想贏你，只想跟你，一起把這盤棋掀了。

en.content: This marriage was someone else's calculated move on the board — but what I never saw coming was that two people each hiding a blade, sitting long enough at the same table, slowly learned to lay the blade somewhere the other could see.
en.editorNote: For a political-marriage, wary-to-trusting arc — pairs with a red-veil or facing-each-other-by-candlelight still; for the "guarded my whole life, took off my armor first in front of you" relationship.
variations: We were both pieces pushed onto the board — the one thing no one calculated was that I stopped wanting to beat you, and only wanted, with you, to flip the whole table over.

items.sourceNote: 翹楚（2026）「重生後拋開戀愛腦、憑先知逆襲」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 上一世我把聰明全用在猜你愛不愛我，這一世我學乖了——同樣一顆腦子，拿去看清棋局，比拿去揣摩一個人的心意，值錢太多。
zh-tw.editorNote: 重生大女主、拋開戀愛腦清醒逆襲主題，配覺醒或執棋劇照，或寫給「別再把力氣浪費在猜心，拿回去經營自己」的人。
variations: 重來一次我才明白，我不是不夠聰明，我只是從前把聰明，都押在了不該押的人身上。

en.content: Last life I spent all my cleverness guessing whether you loved me; this life I've wised up — the same mind, turned to reading the board instead of reading one person's heart, is worth so much more.
en.editorNote: For a rebirth-heroine ditching the love-brain and rising sharp — pairs with an awakening or chess-piece still; for the "stop burning energy second-guessing feelings, invest it in yourself" person.
variations: Doing it over, I finally understood — it wasn't that I wasn't clever enough, I'd just staked all my cleverness on the wrong person.

items.sourceNote: 百花殺（2026）「冷情公主與人互相救贖」重生復仇+雙向救贖母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我把心關成一座冷宮，是怕再有人進來拆我的台；後來你不敲門也不硬闖，只在門外點了一盞燈——原來救贖不是誰把誰拉出來，是我自己，願意為那盞燈再開一次門。
zh-tw.editorNote: 冷情大女主雙向救贖主題，配孤宮燈火或並肩劇照，或寫給「以為自己不需要人，卻被一個人慢慢焐熱」的心。
variations: 他們都想改造我心裡那片荒，只有你不動手——你只是站在旁邊，讓我知道就算荒著，也有人肯陪著。

en.content: I sealed my heart into a cold, abandoned palace, afraid someone would come in and tear it down again; then you didn't knock and didn't force the door — you just lit a lamp outside it. Turns out redemption isn't someone dragging you out; it's me, willing to open the door one more time for that lamp.
en.editorNote: For a cold-hearted heroine and mutual redemption — pairs with a lone-palace-lamp or side-by-side still; for the heart that thought it needed no one but got slowly warmed by one person.
variations: Everyone wanted to remake the wasteland inside me; you were the only one who didn't lift a hand — you just stood beside it, letting me know that even left barren, someone was willing to stay.

items.sourceNote: 東宮/花千骨式「原諒你也放過自己」虐戀成全母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我原諒你了，連同那些甜的、欠的、奢望的、絕望的，我一併原諒；不是你值得，是我終於捨得，鬆開手裡那根，勒了我這麼多年的線。
zh-tw.editorNote: 虐戀放下、原諒與自我成全主題，配轉身離去或水邊獨立劇照，或寫給「原諒不是為了你，是為了放過我自己」的心情。
variations: 我選擇放了你，順手也把我自己，從那場我們都輸了的舊夢裡，一起放了出來。

en.content: I forgive you — the sweetness, the debts, the wishful hoping, the despair, all of it, I forgive at once. Not because you earned it, but because I'm finally willing to let go of the thread that's been cutting into my hand all these years.
en.editorNote: For a tragic-love release — forgiveness as letting yourself off the hook; pairs with a turning-away or standing-by-the-water still; for the "I forgive you not for you, but to free myself" feeling.
variations: I choose to let you go, and on the same breath I let myself out too — out of that old dream where we both lost.

items.sourceNote: 2026 仙俠「斬妖者愛上妖」正邪對立立場相反母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這把劍，本是為了斬盡你這一族而鑄的；偏偏舉到你面前那一刻，我第一次覺得，也許出錯的不是你，是這把劍，也是握著它的我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 斬妖者愛上妖、立場對立卻動心主題，配持劍對峙或雨中對視劇照，或寫給「明明該恨你，卻恨不下去」的兩難。
variations: 世人要我斬妖除魔，可我看著你的眼睛，實在分不清——到底誰才是那個，心裡藏著惡意的人。

en.content: This sword of mine was forged to wipe out your whole kind; yet the instant I raised it in front of you, I felt for the first time that maybe the one in the wrong wasn't you — it was the blade, and the one holding it, me.
en.editorNote: For a demon-hunter-falls-for-the-demon, opposite-sides-yet-drawn-in trope — pairs with a sword-standoff or facing-in-the-rain still; for the "should hate you but can't" dilemma.
variations: The world tells me to slay demons and cut down evil, but looking into your eyes, I honestly can't tell anymore which of us is the one truly hiding malice inside.

items.sourceNote: 翹楚（2026）將門之女重生復仇「這一世我不再等人來救」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 上一世我把刀遞給別人，指望有人替我出頭，結果等來的是背後那一刀；這一世刀我自己握，路我自己走，誰要動我，先問過我手裡這把再說。
zh-tw.editorNote: 重生復仇大女主、從等待救援到自己扛刀主題，配持刀覺醒或雪中獨行劇照，或寫給「這次不靠別人、我自己來」的自己。
variations: 以前我總在等一個英雄，後來才明白——我把自己活成那個英雄，比誰都靠得住。

en.content: Last life I handed my blade to others and waited for someone to fight for me — what came instead was a knife in the back. This life I hold my own blade and walk my own road; anyone who wants to touch me can answer to it first.
en.editorNote: For a rebirth-revenge heroine going from waiting-to-be-saved to carrying her own blade — pairs with a blade-in-hand awakening or lone-walk-in-snow still; for the "this time I do it myself" you.
variations: I used to keep waiting for a hero to show up; later I understood — becoming that hero myself is the only one I can truly count on.

items.sourceNote: 劍來（2026）少年闖江湖「心正即劍正」武俠成長母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 師父沒教我怎麼贏，只反覆說一句：劍不歪，是因為握劍的人不歪；你若心裡先亂了，天下最快的劍，也刺不中該刺的地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 少年武俠闖蕩、修心重於修劍主題，配拔劍練功或山巔獨立劇照，或寫給「先把自己站穩，再談贏」的心情。
variations: 這一路我學會的不是招式，是無論身邊多亂，先把自己這口氣，穩穩地按回胸口。

en.content: My master never taught me how to win — he only kept repeating one thing: the sword stays straight because the one holding it does; let your heart go crooked first, and the fastest blade under heaven still won't strike where it should.
en.editorNote: For a coming-of-age wuxia journey where mastering the self beats mastering the sword — pairs with a drawing-the-blade or lone-mountain-peak still; for the "steady yourself before you talk about winning" mood.
variations: What I learned on this road wasn't any technique — it was how, no matter the chaos around me, to press my own breath back down steady into my chest first.

items.sourceNote: 折月亮（2026）青梅竹馬雙向暗戀「藏了很多年」甜寵母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我們一起長大的這些年，我把「喜歡」兩個字往肚裡吞了無數次，怕一說出口，連現在這樣站在你旁邊的資格都沒了——結果今天才知道，原來你也一樣，吞了這麼久。
zh-tw.editorNote: 青梅竹馬雙向暗戀、藏了多年終於挑明主題，配並肩長大回憶或屋簷下對視劇照，或寫給「原來我們都以為只有自己在偷偷喜歡」的那個人。
variations: 我以為這份心事只能我一個人扛到老，沒想到抬頭一看，你眼裡藏的，跟我一模一樣。

en.content: All these years growing up together, I swallowed the word "love" more times than I can count — terrified that saying it would cost me even the right to stand beside you like this. And today I finally learn you were doing the exact same thing, holding it in just as long.
en.editorNote: For a childhood-friends-to-lovers, mutual-secret-crush reveal — pairs with a grew-up-side-by-side memory or under-the-eaves eye-contact still; for the "turns out we both thought we were the only one" person.
variations: I thought I'd carry this alone into old age — then I looked up and found the very same thing hiding in your eyes.

items.sourceNote: 江湖夜雨十年燈（2026）腹黑公子×灑脫女俠鬥嘴甜虐母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你說我這人壞得很，算計人心不眨眼——沒錯，可你有沒有發現，我這副滿肚子壞水，唯獨在你面前，一勺都用不出來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 腹黑公子×灑脫女俠歡喜冤家、鬥嘴中藏情主題，配雨夜客棧鬥嘴或並肩對敵劇照，或寫給「對全世界耍心機，唯獨對你耍不起來」的人。
variations: 我這算盤打得比誰都精，偏偏一遇上你，怎麼算都算不過自己那顆偏心。

en.content: You say I'm rotten to the core, scheming without blinking — fair enough. But have you noticed that this whole belly full of tricks of mine, in front of you alone, I can't spoon out a single drop of it?
en.editorNote: For a scheming-noble-and-carefree-swordswoman bickering couple hiding real feelings — pairs with a rainy-inn argument or fighting-back-to-back still; for the "I scheme against the whole world but never you" person.
variations: I run a sharper ledger than anyone, but the moment I'm up against you, no matter how I count it I can never out-reckon my own bias.

items.sourceNote: 月鱗綺紀（2026）畫皮改編「就算世人皆棄，我這張皮下的心是真的」奇幻虐戀母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 世人只當我是張畫出來的皮，說我沒有心；可我這副皮底下的每一下跳動，都是為了你才學會的——原來一顆假的心，也能真到，寧願為你碎掉。
zh-tw.editorNote: 畫皮/非人愛上人的奇幻虐戀、「假的皮真的心」母題，配鏡前畫皮或雨中相認劇照，或寫給「別人說我不夠好，但我對你是真的」的心情。
variations: 他們說我不是人，不配動心；可若這叫不配，那我情願一輩子都學不會，怎麼不去愛你。

en.content: The world takes me for nothing but a painted skin and says I have no heart; yet every beat beneath this skin is something I only learned for your sake — turns out a false heart can be real enough that it would rather shatter for you.
en.editorNote: For a painted-skin / not-quite-human-loves-a-human fantasy tragedy — the "false skin, true heart" motif; pairs with a painting-the-skin-at-the-mirror or recognizing-each-other-in-the-rain still; for the "they say I'm not good enough, but I'm real with you" feeling.
variations: They say I'm not human, that I've no right to a heart that stirs; but if that's what unworthy means, I'd gladly never learn, my whole life through, how to stop loving you.

items.sourceNote: 2026 古裝甜寵「賜婚假夫妻日久生情」契約婚姻母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這門親事本是聖旨逼來的，我們說好只做給外人看；可日子過著過著，我發現自己開始盼你晚歸時那句「我回來了」，早就不是演給誰看的了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 賜婚/契約假夫妻日久生情主題，配紅蓋頭或並肩用膳劇照，或寫給「一開始是將就，後來是捨不得」的那段關係。
variations: 說好各過各的，可你半夜咳一聲我就醒——這哪還像一場假戲。

en.content: This marriage was forced on us by an imperial decree; we agreed it was all for show. But somewhere along the way, I caught myself waiting for your "I'm home" at the end of the day, and it stopped being a performance for anyone a long time ago.
en.editorNote: For a decreed / fake-marriage couple who fall into real love — pairs with a red-veil or sharing-a-meal still; for the "started as settling, ended up unable to let go" relationship.
variations: We agreed to live separate lives, yet one cough from you in the night and I'm wide awake — hardly still an act, is it?

items.sourceNote: 2026「這一秒過火」明知會受傷仍飛蛾撲火母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我當然知道靠近你會燒傷，這道理不用誰教；可有些火，明知會痛還是想伸手——烤一下你這點暖，比一輩子躲在冷處，值得。
zh-tw.editorNote: 飛蛾撲火/明知沒結果還是想愛一次的主題，配燭火或雨中相擁劇照，或寫給「算完後果，還是選了你」的心情。
variations: 別勸我了，我不是沒算過代價——我是算完之後，還是把手伸向了你。

en.content: Of course I know getting close to you will burn me — no one has to teach me that. But some fires you reach for anyway, pain and all; one moment of your warmth is worth more than a whole life spent hiding somewhere cold.
en.editorNote: For the moth-to-flame, loving-anyway-knowing-it-hurts theme — pairs with a candlelight or embrace-in-the-rain still; for the "knew it'd go nowhere and reached out anyway" feeling.
variations: Stop talking me out of it — it's not that I never counted the cost. I counted it, and still I reached for you.

items.sourceNote: 仙俠「師尊×徒弟」禁忌之戀克制越界拉扯母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你教我出招收招、教我心無雜念，唯獨沒教我——該用哪一招，收住一個徒弟不該對師尊起的那點念頭。
zh-tw.editorNote: 師尊×徒弟禁忌之戀、克制與越界的拉扯主題，配練劍指點或屋簷下對視劇照，或寫給「連喜歡都得偷偷來」的隱忍。
variations: 一身本事都是你給的，可我最想學會的那一課——怎麼不喜歡你——你偏偏沒教。

en.content: You taught me every strike and every parry, taught me to keep my heart clear of distraction — the one thing you never taught me was which move a disciple uses to hold back a feeling he was never supposed to have for his master.
en.editorNote: For a forbidden master-and-disciple romance — the pull between restraint and crossing the line; pairs with a sword-lesson or under-the-eaves eye-contact still; for the "even the liking has to stay a secret" ache.
variations: Every skill I have, you gave me — but the one lesson I wanted most, how to not love you, is the one you never taught.

items.sourceNote: 仙俠輪迴「孟婆湯：寧記得痛也不願忘」虐戀母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 孟婆遞來那碗湯，說喝了就不痛了；我搖頭——寧可帶著記得你的疼走進下輩子，也不要換一個乾乾淨淨、卻從沒愛過你的自己。
zh-tw.editorNote: 忘川/孟婆湯「寧記得痛也不願忘」的輪迴虐戀主題，配奈何橋或回望劇照，或寫給「就算會痛，也不想忘記你」的深情。
variations: 這碗湯我不喝——忘了你之後就算不痛了，那也早就不是我了。

en.content: Meng Po held out the bowl and said one sip would end the pain; I shook my head — I'd sooner carry the ache of remembering you into the next life than trade it for a spotless version of me that never loved you at all.
en.editorNote: For the drink-to-forget-or-keep-the-pain, reincarnation-tragedy theme — pairs with a bridge-of-oblivion or looking-back still; for the "even if it hurts, I won't forget you" devotion.
variations: I won't drink this bowl — sure, forgetting you would end the pain, but by then it wouldn't be me anymore.

items.sourceNote: 古裝「女扮男裝，他早已看穿卻默默守護」身分隱瞞甜寵母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我扮成男子闖了這麼久，騙過了全天下人，唯獨騙不過你——你嘴上說不知道我是誰，可你遞傘、留位、替我擋酒的樣子，早就把我當成要護一輩子的人了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 女扮男裝身分隱瞞、他早已看穿卻默默守護主題，配書院或並肩騎馬劇照，或寫給「以為瞞得天衣無縫、其實他全懂」的那段關係。
variations: 我藏得再好，你那雙眼睛看我的溫度，還是把我一眼認了出來。

en.content: I've passed as a man so long I've fooled everyone under heaven — everyone but you. You say you don't know who I am, yet the way you hand me the umbrella, save me a seat, take the drink meant for me — you decided long ago I'm someone you'll protect for life.
en.editorNote: For a girl-disguised-as-a-boy romance where he saw through it long ago and quietly guards her — pairs with an academy or riding-side-by-side still; for the "thought the disguise was flawless, he knew all along" relationship.
variations: However well I hid it, the warmth in the way your eyes found me gave me away all the same.

items.sourceNote: 佳偶天成（2026）戰鬼族×修仙少女先婚後愛、正邪跨界「疼是為活著」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這一族生來不知痛，直到遇見你，第一次被你氣得心口發疼——原來會為一個人痛，才算真正活過一次。
zh-tw.editorNote: 正邪跨界、先婚後愛虐戀主題，配戰鬼×修仙反差劇照，或寫給「是你讓我第一次有了感覺」的那個人。
variations: 從前刀劍加身我都無感，如今你皺一下眉，我這顆心就跟著抽一下。

en.content: My kind was born never knowing pain — until you, until the first time you made me ache right here in my chest. Turns out aching over someone is the only proof I've ever truly been alive.
en.editorNote: For a good-and-evil, married-first-love-later tragedy — pairs with a demon-meets-cultivator contrast still; for the person who made you feel something for the first time.
variations: Blades to the body never touched me before; now one furrow of your brow and my whole heart flinches with it.

items.sourceNote: 凡人修仙傳（2026）「以凡人之軀逆天修仙」不服命堅韌母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我沒有天生的靈根，也沒有貴人相助，有的只是一口不肯認命的氣——這條修仙路，我就一步一步用凡人的腳，走給那些天才看。
zh-tw.editorNote: 凡人逆襲、堅韌不服輸主題，配獨行登山或閉關劇照，或寫給「沒背景沒天賦、只靠一口氣硬撐」的自己。
variations: 別人騰雲駕霧，我用走的；只要方向沒錯，慢一點又何妨。

en.content: I wasn't born with spirit roots, and no patron ever lifted me up — all I've got is one breath that refuses to accept its fate. So I'll walk this road to immortality one mortal step at a time, and let the prodigies watch.
en.editorNote: For the ordinary-person-beats-the-odds, sheer-grit theme — pairs with a lone-climb or secluded-cultivation still; for the you with no talent and no backing, running on stubbornness alone.
variations: Others ride the clouds; I go on foot — and as long as the direction's right, what's the harm in being slow?

items.sourceNote: 翹楚等 2026 大女主古裝劇「打破偏見、自己爭一席之地」自強母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你們笑我一個女子逞什麼強，我偏要爭這口氣——這世道沒留給女子的位子，那我就自己搬一張椅子，坐到你們都得抬頭看的地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 大女主自強、打破偏見主題，配朝堂或登高劇照，或寫給「別人不給機會、就自己創造機會」的女性。
variations: 沒有人替我開路，那我就自己成為那個開路的人。

en.content: You laugh — what's a woman doing fighting so hard? Well, I intend to. This world left no seat for women, so I'll drag over my own chair and sit somewhere you all have to look up to reach.
en.editorNote: For a leading-lady, breaking-the-bias theme — pairs with a court or climbing-high still; for the woman who makes her own opening when no one hands her one.
variations: No one's clearing a path for me, so I'll be the one who clears it.

items.sourceNote: 尚公主/長公主在上等 2026 古裝劇「尊貴身分為愛放下姿態」甜寵母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我貴為公主，這一生從沒對誰低過頭；可為了你，我願意第一次彎下腰——不是認輸，是想牽起你的手，跟你一起走。
zh-tw.editorNote: 長公主/尊貴身分為愛放下姿態的甜寵主題，配宮宴或並肩劇照，或寫給「向誰都不低頭、只對你溫柔」的人。
variations: 這天下人都得向我行禮，唯獨你，我想平起平坐地愛。

en.content: I was born a princess and have bowed my head to no one in my life; but for you, I'll bend for the first time — not in surrender, but to reach down, take your hand, and walk beside you.
en.editorNote: For a highborn-princess-lowers-her-guard sweet theme — pairs with a palace-banquet or side-by-side still; for the one who bows to no one but is gentle only with you.
variations: The whole realm has to bow to me — you're the only one I want to love as an equal.

items.sourceNote: 一甌春等 2026 古裝甜寵劇「春日日常勝過海誓山盟」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我不懂什麼海枯石爛，我只想每年春天第一甌新茶，都先斟給你——這一輩子的春天，我都想留給你先嚐。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝甜寵日常、春日約定主題，配茶館或花下劇照，或寫給「不講大道理、只想把最好的小事都給你」的人。
variations: 別人的情話說得驚天動地，我只想每個春天，都有你在旁邊一起喝這口茶。

en.content: I don't know anything about seas running dry or stones wearing away — I just want every spring's first cup of new tea poured for you first. Every spring of this whole life, I want you to taste it before anyone else.
en.editorNote: For a cozy period-romance, springtime-promise theme — pairs with a teahouse or under-the-blossoms still; for the one who skips grand speeches and just wants to give you the best small things.
variations: Others swear earth-shaking oaths; I only want you beside me for this one cup, every spring.

items.sourceNote: 劍來（2026）少年修行尋父「泥瓶巷少年憑意志上路」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我出身低得不能再低，天賦也不算好——可我認準了一件事：路是走出來的，不是別人替你算好的，我這雙腳只認往前，不認命。
zh-tw.editorNote: 少年修行/逆境成長主題，配獨自上路的背影劇照，或寫給正從谷底一步步往上爬的自己。
variations: 別人一出生就站在山頂，我從山腳開始爬——但爬到一半我發現，風景本來就該是自己一步步換來的。

en.content: I was born about as low as it gets, and my talent's nothing special — but I've settled one thing: a road is something you walk into being, not something someone calculates for you. These feet of mine only know forward, not fate.
en.editorNote: For a coming-of-age, climb-from-the-bottom theme — pairs with a lone-figure-setting-out still; for the you working up from rock bottom.
variations: Some are born standing on the summit; I started at the foot of the mountain — and halfway up I realized the view was always meant to be earned one step at a time.

items.sourceNote: 月鱗綺紀（2026，改編自畫皮）「皮相之下才是真心」奇幻母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 世人只肯愛一張畫得好看的皮，我偏要看皮底下那顆心——你把最醜的一面翻給我看，我還是說，這才是我要的你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 畫皮/奇幻愛情「愛真心不愛皮相」主題，配面具或鏡像劇照，或寫給「你不必完美，我要的是真的你」的人。
variations: 別人愛你的臉，我愛你摘下臉之後，還敢站在我面前的那份坦白。

en.content: The world only cares to love a well-painted skin; I'd rather see the heart underneath — turn your ugliest side over to me, and I'll still say this is the you I wanted.
en.editorNote: For a Painted-Skin-style fantasy romance — loving the real heart, not the surface; pairs with a mask or mirror still; for the "you don't have to be perfect" person.
variations: Others love your face; I love the honesty of you still standing in front of me after the face comes off.

items.sourceNote: 尚公主（2026）「公主政治聯姻卻不甘做棋子」大女主自主母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們把我當一枚聯姻的棋子送出去，卻忘了——棋子是死的，人是活的，這盤棋要怎麼下，我偏要親手翻一次桌。
zh-tw.editorNote: 政治聯姻大女主、拒當棋子主題，配鳳冠或棋盤劇照，或寫給「被安排的人生，我要自己改寫」的自己。
variations: 你們算計了我的婚事，卻算不到我的心——這一局，我不當棋，我要當執棋的那雙手。

en.content: They shipped me off as a pawn in a marriage alliance, and forgot one thing — a pawn is dead wood, a person is alive; how this game gets played, I'll flip the whole board myself.
en.editorNote: For a political-marriage heroine refusing to be a pawn — pairs with a phoenix-crown or chessboard still; for the "my arranged life, I'll rewrite it" you.
variations: You schemed over my marriage but couldn't calculate my heart — this round, I'm not the piece, I'm the hand that moves them.

items.sourceNote: 鹹魚飛升（2026）「修仙第一人重生只想種田躺平」佛系反差母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 上輩子我拼成了修仙界第一人，累到連死都覺得是休假；這輩子我只想種兩畝田、曬三個太陽——什麼飛升登頂，都不如一頓熱飯來得實在。
zh-tw.editorNote: 佛系躺平/種田修仙反差幽默主題，配田園或曬太陽劇照，或寫給「拚夠了，這回只想好好過日子」的自己。
variations: 別人搶著飛升，我只想飛去床上躺平——爭來爭去的那個第一，我上輩子已經替你們累過了。

en.content: Last life I clawed my way to being the greatest cultivator alive — so worn out that even dying felt like a vacation. This life I just want two acres to farm and three suns to sit under. Ascending to the top can't beat one hot meal.
en.editorNote: For the laid-back, "salted-fish" farming-cultivator humor — pairs with a countryside or sitting-in-the-sun still; for the "done grinding, now I just want to live well" you.
variations: Everyone's scrambling to ascend; I just want to ascend into bed — that number-one spot they're all fighting over, I already exhausted myself earning it last lifetime.

items.sourceNote: 玉茗茶骨（2026）製茶商戰大女主、性別翻轉台詞 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們笑我一個女子也想撐起一間茶莊，我只回一句——茶好不好，喝的人舌頭說了算，跟泡茶的是男是女，半點關係都沒有。
zh-tw.editorNote: 商戰大女主、打破性別偏見主題，配製茶或茶莊劇照，或寫給「別用我的性別，來衡量我的本事」的自己。
variations: 這行的水再深，我一勺一勺也趟得過去——瞧不起我的人，最後都得端起我泡的那杯茶。

en.content: They laughed that a woman thought she could keep a teahouse standing; I only said — whether the tea is any good is for the drinker's tongue to decide, and it has nothing to do with whether the one brewing it is a man or a woman.
en.editorNote: For a business-rival heroine breaking gender bias — pairs with a tea-brewing or teahouse still; for the "don't measure my ability by my gender" you.
variations: However deep the waters of this trade run, I'll wade through them one ladle at a time — the ones who looked down on me all end up raising a cup I brewed.

items.sourceNote: 白日提燈（2026）玄幻甜虐「生死宿命雙向救贖」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 命裡註定我們要死一次，那我認了——只求那一劫來的時候，別讓我一個人先走，你在後頭，我伸手還牽得到你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 玄幻甜虐、生死宿命雙向救贖主題，配提燈或雨夜劇照，或寫給「就算結局是苦的，也想跟你一起撐到最後」的人。
variations: 別人怕劫難，我不怕——只要你在劫裡跟我同一邊，天塌下來，我們兩個一起接。

en.content: If fate has already decided we must die once, then fine, I accept it — I only ask that when the reckoning comes, you don't let me go first alone; be right behind me, close enough that my hand still finds yours.
en.editorNote: For a fantasy sweet-tragedy of shared fate and mutual salvation — pairs with a lantern or rainy-night still; for the "even if the ending is bitter, I want to hold out with you" person.
variations: Others fear the reckoning; I don't — as long as you're on my side of it, if the sky falls, the two of us will catch it together.

items.sourceNote: 慶餘年系列（2026 熱度不減）「現代靈魂穿越+機智快嘴機鋒」register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這人沒什麼大本事，就是心裡裝了些你們沒聽過的道理——所以你別急著擺架子，這場我陪你聊到底，看誰先詞窮。
zh-tw.editorNote: 穿越機智、現代靈魂大戰古代規矩的幽默機鋒主題，配朝堂鬥嘴或酒樓劇照，或當「嘴上不輸人」的社群簽名。
variations: 你講的是老規矩，我講的是新道理——這桌棋你按規矩下，我可未必按規矩贏。

en.content: I'm no man of great talents; I just carry a few ideas in my head you've never heard before — so don't rush to put on airs, I'll banter this out with you to the end and see who runs out of words first.
en.editorNote: For the transmigrator-wit trope — a modern mind sparring with ancient rules; pairs with a court-argument or tavern still; works as a "never lose a war of words" bio.
variations: You quote the old rules, I quote a new logic — you play this game of chess by the book, but I might not win by it.

items.sourceNote: 逍遙（2026）武俠「逍遙灑脫、爭自由不爭權位」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 有人一輩子在爭那把椅子，我這輩子只想爭一件事——想走就走，想留就留，天大地大，沒有一處是關得住我的牢。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠逍遙灑脫、追求自由主題，配仗劍遠行或山巔劇照，或寫給「不被任何人事物困住」的自己。
variations: 名利那條路太擠，我偏往沒人走的那頭去——反正這一身輕功，就是拿來離開的。

en.content: Some people spend a lifetime fighting for that one chair; all I want to fight for is this — leave when I want, stay when I want, and in all this wide earth, not one place is a cell that can hold me.
en.editorNote: For carefree wuxia wanderlust and the pull of freedom — pairs with a sword-in-hand journey or mountaintop still; for the "nothing gets to trap me" you.
variations: The road to fame and fortune is too crowded, so I head the way no one walks — this lightness-skill of mine was always meant for leaving.

items.sourceNote: 家業（2026，楊紫）家族商戰大女主「白手守業」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這份家業不是誰施捨給我的，是我一筆一筆賬、一步一步路，自己掙回來的——所以誰要伸手來拿，得先問過我這雙記了十年帳的手。
zh-tw.editorNote: 家族商戰大女主、白手守業主題，配帳本或宅門劇照，或寫給「我的東西是自己拚來的，不容人白拿」的自己。
variations: 他們等著看我把家敗光，我偏要把它撐得比誰都穩——這口氣，我爭的不是家業，是我自己。

en.content: This family enterprise wasn't handed to me as charity — I earned it back ledger by ledger, step by step, myself — so anyone reaching out to take it had better first answer to these two hands that have kept the books for ten years.
en.editorNote: For a family-business-saga heroine building and defending her legacy — pairs with an account-book or grand-household still; for the "what's mine, I earned, and no one takes it for free" you.
variations: They're waiting to watch me run the house into the ground; I'll keep it steadier than anyone instead — the pride I'm fighting for isn't the estate, it's myself.

items.sourceNote: 夢花廷（2026，張婧儀×陳哲遠）「盲公主覺醒預知能力×宿命虐戀」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這雙眼看得見天下所有人的結局，唯獨算不準——你走近的時候，我這顆心為什麼會先亂了節拍。
zh-tw.editorNote: 虐心宿命、命定卻看不清眼前人主題，配盲女或占卜劇照，或寫給「什麼都看得透，只看不透自己對你的心動」。
variations: 別人的來路去路我一眼就懂，偏偏你這個人，讓我第一次不敢往下看。

en.content: These eyes of mine can see the ending written for every soul under heaven — the only thing I can't calculate is why, the moment you come near, my heart loses the beat first.
en.editorNote: For a fated, tragic love where you can read everyone's future but not your own heart — pairs with a blind-seer or divination still.
variations: I read everyone's path at a glance, and yet you're the one person I don't dare look ahead at.

items.sourceNote: 尚公主（2026，孟子義×李昀銳）「驕縱公主×寒門書生、雙向奔赴」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你說我們之間隔著門第、隔著千里長安路，可我偏不信——我這個公主的封號，若連自己想站的那個人身邊都站不到，那要它做什麼？
zh-tw.editorNote: 身份差距、雙向奔赴甜寵主題，配公主與書生對望劇照，或寫給「就算全世界說我們不般配，我也要往你那邊走」。
variations: 他們替我算門當戶對，我只算一件事——這一路走到你面前，我願不願意。

en.content: You say what stands between us is rank, and a thousand miles of road to the capital — but I refuse to believe it. If this title of princess can't even carry me to the side of the one I want to stand beside, then what good is it?
en.editorNote: For a status-gap, mutual-devotion sweet romance — pairs with a princess-and-scholar still; for "the whole world says we don't match, and I'm walking toward you anyway."
variations: Let them calculate whether we're well-matched — I only calculate one thing: whether I'm willing to walk this whole road to reach you.

items.sourceNote: 太平年（2026，五代十國「吳越納土歸宋」以退換太平）家國母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這江山我讓得出手，因為我要的從來不是史書上多幾行歌功頌德，是我治下的百姓，明年開春能安安穩穩地種完那一季的田。
zh-tw.editorNote: 五代十國家國情懷、「以退換太平」帝王格局主題，配朝堂或江山遠景劇照，或形容「真正的贏，是讓在乎的人不必再受苦」。
variations: 我若守著這個位置讓千萬人流血，那這位置，不坐也罷。

en.content: I can hand over this kingdom without flinching — because what I ever wanted was never a few more lines of praise in the history books, but for the people under my rule to plant next spring's fields in peace.
en.editorNote: For a Five-Dynasties-era ruler weighing peace over pride — pairs with a court or vast-landscape still; "real winning is sparing the people you care about more suffering."
variations: If keeping this throne means ten thousand more bleed, then let it sit empty.

items.sourceNote: 2026 仙俠劇「斬妖兵器愛上妖（斬妖者愛上妖）」正邪對立母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這把刀生來就是為了斬盡天下妖邪，可你偏偏是我提刀千年，第一個怎麼也劈不下去的那一個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠正邪對立、「為斬你而生卻對你心軟」反差主題，配持刀對峙劇照，或寫給「我本該是你的剋星，卻成了你的軟肋」。
variations: 世人握著我這把刀去斬妖，只有我自己知道，刀刃在你面前，抖了。

en.content: This blade of mine was forged to cut down every demon under heaven — and yet you're the one soul, in a thousand years of drawing it, I can't bring the edge down on.
en.editorNote: For an enemies-by-nature xianxia romance — the weapon made to destroy you going soft — pairs with a blade-standoff still; "I was meant to be your bane and became your weak spot."
variations: The world grips me as a demon-slaying blade; only I know the edge trembled the moment it faced you.

items.sourceNote: 夢花廷（2026，張婧儀×陳哲遠）「替身虐戀、宿命感」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我早就知道，我不過是你心口那個人的影子；可就算只能當一道影子，我也想貼著你近一點，近到你偶爾會錯認，也好。
zh-tw.editorNote: 替身虐戀、明知是替身仍甘願靠近主題，配背影或錯認劇照，或寫給「明知不被當成第一人選，還是捨不得走」。
variations: 你把我錯喊成別人的名字時，我沒糾正——那一瞬間，至少你眼裡是有我的。

en.content: I've known all along that I'm only the shadow of the person in your heart — but even if a shadow is all I can be, I want to press close to you, close enough that now and then you mistake me for them. I'd take even that.
en.editorNote: For the stand-in-love trope — knowingly a substitute and staying anyway; pairs with a from-behind or mistaken-identity still; for "I know I'm not your first choice and still can't bring myself to leave."
variations: When you called me by someone else's name, I didn't correct you — for that one second, at least your eyes had me in them.

items.sourceNote: 月鱗綺紀（2026，改編自畫皮）「皮相易畫、真心難描」皮囊 vs 真心母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 會畫皮的人多的是，一張臉想換就換；可我這輩子想守的，從來不是你哪一張臉，是那張臉底下，那顆換不掉的心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 畫皮/換臉奇幻設定深情主題，配面具或水中倒影劇照，或寫給「愛的是你這個人，不是這副皮相」的那個人。
variations: 你把臉換給我看的那天我沒認錯，因為我認的，本來就不是臉。

en.content: Plenty of people can paint on a new face and swap it whenever they like — but the thing I've spent my life wanting to keep was never which face you wear, it's the one heart underneath that can't be swapped out.
en.editorNote: For a face-swapping/painted-skin fantasy romance — pairs with a mask or water-reflection still; for the "I love the person, not the face" one.
variations: The day you changed your face to test me, I didn't get you wrong — because what I recognize was never a face to begin with.

items.sourceNote: 香蜜沉沉燼如霜「你可曾愛過我？從未」意難平母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我死之前只問了你一句：這些年，你可曾動過一點真心？你頓了很久，才輕輕搖頭——原來我這一生的執念，抵不過你這一下,連猶豫都算不上的搖頭。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠意難平、單向深情落空名場面配字，或形容「愛了很久，換來一句從未」，配訣別或落淚劇照。
variations: 我不是輸給了別人，我是輸給了那個，從頭到尾都不曾把我放進心裡的你。

en.content: Before I died I asked you only one thing: in all these years, did you ever feel a single true beat of it? You paused a long while, then shook your head, so gently — turns out a lifetime of my longing couldn't outweigh one small shake of your head that didn't even count as hesitation.
en.editorNote: For an unrequited xianxia heartbreak scene — loved for years, answered with "never"; pairs with a farewell or teary still.
variations: I didn't lose to someone else — I lost to the you who never once let me into your heart at all.

items.sourceNote: 雨霖鈴（2026，楊洋）武俠懸疑「朝堂 vs 江湖、清白難得」register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我在朝堂上磕頭，在江湖裡拔刀，兩邊的規矩我都學過；可走到最後才明白，最難守的不是官位，也不是名聲，是那句——問心無愧。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠朝堂權謀主題、正邪抉擇名場面配字，或職場暗示「守得住底線比守得住位置難」，配官袍或雨夜劇照。
variations: 這一路我彎過腰、也拔過刀，唯獨沒對得起自己良心的那幾次,到現在還睡不安穩。

en.content: I've kowtowed at court and drawn my blade in the jianghu — I learned the rules of both worlds. Only at the very end did I understand: the hardest thing to keep was never the title, never the name, it was being able to say I'd done nothing my own heart could accuse me of.
en.editorNote: For a wuxia court-intrigue theme and righteous-choice scenes, or office subtext that keeping your integrity is harder than keeping your seat — pairs with an official-robe or rainy-night still.
variations: I've bowed low and I've drawn steel all down this road — it's only the few times I failed my own conscience that still keep me from sleeping easy.

items.sourceNote: 江山為聘（2026）「以江山作聘禮」帝王娶妻母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 別人娶妻，備的是三書六禮；我娶你，備的是這整座江山——你若嫌它太重，我明日就替你，把它治理得輕巧一點。
zh-tw.editorNote: 帝王/權貴以江山為聘的霸氣告白主題，配大婚或朝堂劇照，或寫給「別人給禮物，你想給對方全世界」的那個人。
variations: 這江山我打下來的時候還沒遇見你，如今才知道，原來它一直是替你留的聘禮。

en.content: Other men bring the customary gifts and rites to a marriage; to marry you I bring this whole realm — and if you find it too heavy, tomorrow I'll set about governing it well enough to make it lighter in your hands.
en.editorNote: For an emperor's grand "the empire is your betrothal gift" confession — pairs with a royal-wedding or throne-room still; for the one who'd hand over the whole world.
variations: I won this realm before I ever met you, and only now do I understand it was always the bride-price I'd been keeping for you.

items.sourceNote: 尚公主/表妹萬福（2026）古裝甜寵歡喜冤家「嘴上嫌棄、身體誠實」鬥嘴母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我天天在你耳邊唸你煩、你吵、你不成體統，可你要真被我唸走了，這王府上下、這滿桌好菜、這一整個熱鬧，我一個人守著，又留給誰看？
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝甜寵歡喜冤家、嘴硬心軟主題，配鬥嘴或偷笑劇照，或寫給「嘴上嫌到不行、心裡半刻都離不開」的那個人。
variations: 我承認是天天嫌你，可我從沒說過要你走——嫌，是因為你還在;真走了，我連嫌的人都沒了。

en.content: Every day I nag right into your ear that you're a pain, you're loud, you've got no manners — but if my nagging actually drove you off, then this whole manor, this table full of good food, all this liveliness, who exactly am I keeping it lively for, alone?
en.editorNote: For a bickering, enemies-to-sweethearts period romance — sharp tongue, soft heart; pairs with a squabbling or hiding-a-smile still; for the one you complain about endlessly and can't be apart from for a second.
variations: I'll admit I nag you every single day — but I never once said leave. I nag because you're still here; if you actually left, I wouldn't even have anyone to nag.

items.sourceNote: 凡人修仙傳（2026，楊洋飾韓立）「以凡人之軀苦修成仙」逆襲勵志母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們笑我資質平庸，這輩子成不了仙。我沒回嘴——我只是把別人睡覺的時辰，都拿來多走了一里路。
zh-tw.editorNote: 修仙逆襲、平凡人苦熬出頭主題，配苦修或登階劇照，或寫給「沒有天賦、只有不肯停」的自己。
variations: 天資是別人給的，路是我自己走的——走得夠久，凡人也能站到神仙看得見的地方。

en.content: They laughed that I was too ordinary to ever become an immortal. I didn't argue back — I just took the hours everyone else spent sleeping and walked one more mile with them.
en.editorNote: For a self-made, underdog cultivation arc — pairs with a hard-training or step-climbing still; for the you with no talent, only a refusal to stop.
variations: Talent is handed to you; the road you walk yourself — walk it long enough and even a mortal can stand where the gods can see.

items.sourceNote: 劍來（2026，吳磊）少年修真「求道先問心」成長母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 師父說修行千萬條，第一條最難——不是練劍，是每天問自己一句：今天走的這步，對得起心裡那個少年嗎？
zh-tw.editorNote: 少年求道、修心成長主題，配負劍少年或書院劇照，或寫給「怕自己走著走著，就把當初弄丟了」的人。
variations: 劍我可以慢慢練，可那顆一開始想仗劍為誰的心，一旦丟了，再快的劍也接不回來。

en.content: My master said of all the countless paths of cultivation, the first is the hardest — it was never the swordwork, it's asking yourself each day whether the step you took answers to the boy you once were.
en.editorNote: For a coming-of-age, tempering-the-heart cultivation theme — pairs with a young-swordsman or academy still; for anyone afraid of losing who they started out as.
variations: The sword I can train slowly, but the heart that first picked it up for someone's sake — lose that, and no blade, however fast, can win it back.

items.sourceNote: 冰湖重生（2026，楚喬傳續作）亂世女戰士「重生復仇」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們把我推進冰湖那年，以為我就此沉了；他們沒算到，冰底也還有一口氣，撐著一個人一寸一寸爬回岸上，把該討的，一筆一筆討回來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 亂世重生大女主、復仇覺醒主題，配雪地、戰場或浴血歸來劇照，或寫給「以為我完了、我偏要活著回來」的自己。
variations: 你們沉得了我一次，沉不了第二次——這回上岸的我，手裡再不是空的。

en.content: The year they shoved me under the ice, they thought I'd sunk for good. What they didn't count on was that even beneath the ice there's one breath left — enough to carry a person, inch by inch, back to shore, to collect every debt owed, one by one.
en.editorNote: For a wartime rebirth-heroine's revenge-and-awakening arc — pairs with a snowfield, battlefield, or blood-soaked-return still; for the "you thought I was finished, I came back alive on purpose" you.
variations: You could drown me once — not twice. This time I climb back out with my hands no longer empty.

items.sourceNote: 2026 古裝甜寵新劇「假裝順路的暗戀」初動心母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我本來只是路過你家門口那條巷子，後來天天路過，再後來——我發現自己記得那條巷子哪塊石板會積水，卻只是為了記得，你哪天會出門。
zh-tw.editorNote: 曖昧初動心、暗戀主題，配巷弄相遇或偷看劇照，或寫給「假裝順路、其實繞路」的那個人。
variations: 我說我只是剛好經過，其實這座城哪條路我都熟——唯獨往你那裡的那條，我走得最慢。

en.content: At first I only happened to pass the alley by your house; then I passed it every day; and then — I realized I'd memorized which flagstone pooled water in the rain, all just to know which days you'd be heading out.
en.editorNote: For an early, tentative crush — pairs with an alley-encounter or stolen-glance still; for the one who pretends it's on the way when it's really a detour.
variations: I said I was just passing through, but I know every road in this city — it's only the one toward you that I somehow always walk the slowest.

items.sourceNote: 家業（2026，楊紫）古裝宅門「女子撐起家業」大女主母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這份家業是我一磚一瓦守下來的。他們說女子當家撐不久，我倒想問一句——這門檻上的灰，是誰半夜起來，一遍一遍擦亮的？
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝宅門/商戰大女主、女性撐家立業主題，配當家或帳房劇照，或寫給「被質疑撐不起、偏要撐給你看」的女性。
variations: 旁人只看見這家門面光鮮，沒看見我把多少個不能倒的夜，一個人熬成了天亮。

en.content: This family business I held together brick by brick. They say a woman running the house never lasts — but I'd ask them: the dust on this threshold, who do they think got up in the dead of night to wipe it clean, over and over?
en.editorNote: For a period mansion or merchant-house heroine holding up the family trade — pairs with a head-of-household or ledger-room still; for the woman told she can't carry it who carries it anyway.
variations: Outsiders only see how bright this household's front looks; they never saw how many nights I couldn't afford to fall, ground alone into daybreak.

items.sourceNote: 2026 仙俠劇「無底線偏愛」母題（月鱗綺紀 register：就算你要下地獄我也陪你）參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你要成仙，我陪你飛升；你要墮魔，我也跟著往下跳——你走哪條路我不攔，我只堅持一件事：下一步落腳的地方，得有我一個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠無底線偏愛、雙向奔赴主題，配並肩踏光或墜落劇照，或寫給「你去哪我都跟」的那個人。
variations: 天堂地獄我沒興趣分辨，我只認得——你在的那一邊，才叫我要去的方向。

en.content: You want to become an immortal? I'll ascend with you. You want to fall to darkness? Then I jump too — I won't stop you from any road, I only insist on one thing: wherever your next step lands, I'm standing there.
en.editorNote: For the all-in, no-limits xianxia devotion — pairs with a side-by-side ascent or falling still; for the "wherever you go, I follow" person.
variations: I've no interest in telling heaven from hell — I only know that whichever side you're on is the direction I'm headed.

items.sourceNote: 2026 仙俠劇「三婚三離」破鏡重圓/歡喜冤家母題（臨江仙 register）參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我們和離了三次，我也搬走了三次——可每次收拾行李，我都故意在你那兒落下一樣東西，好讓自己有個名正言順的理由，再回來一趟。
zh-tw.editorNote: 歡喜冤家、分分合合/破鏡重圓主題，配拌嘴又和好的甜虐劇照，或形容「嘴上說走，心裡根本沒打算真走」。
variations: 說了無數次再也不理你，可下一句想說的話，還是先在心裡排隊排給了你。

en.content: We've split up three times, and three times I've moved out — but every time I pack, I leave one thing behind at your place on purpose, just so I've got a perfectly good excuse to come back one more time.
en.editorNote: For the bickering, on-again-off-again, back-together trope — for the person who says they're leaving but never really means it.
variations: I've sworn a hundred times I'm done with you, and yet the next thing I want to say still lines up in my heart for you first.

items.sourceNote: 2026 古裝奇幻「人妖殊途卻相守」母題（狐妖小紅娘竹業篇 register：中式美學×極致深情）參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你是妖，我是人，世人說我們生來就不該走到一塊；可我這輩子做過最像個「人」的一件事，偏偏就是不管不顧地，愛上了你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 人妖殊途、身分殊異卻相守主題，配中式美學唯美劇照，或寫給「全世界都說不該、我偏要」的那份感情。
variations: 他們用族譜、用天規把我們分兩邊，可我的心不識字，它只認得你。

en.content: You're a spirit, I'm human, and the world says we were never meant to end up together — yet the single most human thing I've ever done was fall for you anyway, recklessly and completely.
en.editorNote: For the human-and-spirit, star-crossed-but-together theme — pairs with a lush, traditional-aesthetic still; for the love the whole world calls impossible.
variations: They split us onto two sides with bloodlines and heavenly law, but my heart can't read a word of it — it only recognizes you.

items.sourceNote: 2026 古裝劇「尚公主」身分懸殊駙馬深情母題（尚公主 register）參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 旁人都說尚了公主是天大的體面，可我要的從來不是這身駙馬官服——我只想，在你不必端著公主架子的時候，替你把那頂沉甸甸的冠冕，輕輕摘下來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 身分懸殊、駙馬/尚公主深情主題，配卸下冠冕或宮牆相依劇照，或寫給「在我面前你不必逞強」的那個人。
variations: 世人只看見你頭上的鳳冠有多重，只有我想知道——你今天，累不累。

en.content: Everyone says marrying a princess is the grandest honor there is — but I never wanted the consort's robes. I only want to be the one who lifts that heavy crown off you, gently, in the moments you don't have to play the princess anymore.
en.editorNote: For the mismatched-status, royal-consort devotion theme — pairs with a crown-removed or palace-wall still; for the "you don't have to be strong with me" person.
variations: The world only sees how heavy the phoenix crown sits on your head; I'm the only one who wants to know whether you're tired today.

items.sourceNote: 2026 古裝市井「茶館慢火細品」母題（玉茗茶骨/一甌春 register：以茶喻情）參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 好茶要先苦後回甘，急不得；喜歡一個人也一樣——我願意慢慢等，等你嚐盡了所有的澀，最後回過味來，杯底記得的，是我這一盞的甜。
zh-tw.editorNote: 以茶喻情、市井慢熱主題，配茶館煮茶或對坐劇照，或寫給「不催不趕、願意等你懂」的那份感情。
variations: 我不搶那第一口的濃烈，我只等最後那一口——等你放下杯子還捨不得走的那一下。

en.content: Good tea turns sweet only after the bitterness, and it can't be rushed; loving someone is the same — I'm willing to wait, wait until you've tasted all the astringency, and when it finally comes back around, what lingers at the bottom of the cup is the sweetness of my one pour.
en.editorNote: For a tea-as-love, slow-burn merchant-town theme — pairs with a teahouse or facing-each-other still; for the love that won't rush you into understanding it.
variations: I don't fight for that first bold sip — I just wait for the last one, for the moment you set the cup down and still can't quite bring yourself to leave.
